## Documentation
<!--
Does this PR change USER-FACING admin behaviour the platform-docs corpus should cover?
- NO  → delete this whole section. The doc-curator routine then SKIPS this PR.
- YES → fill it in. The curator reads ONLY this section to draft/update the corpus doc,
        opened as a review PR against docs/platform-docs/ in the DEF repo (the corpus lives
        there). For an Update, name the EXACT existing filename so it edits the right doc.
-->
- **Type:** New Feature | Update
- **Tier:** site_admin
- **Target:** <new doc title (New Feature)  |  existing filename e.g. `chat-settings.md` (Update)>
- **What to document:** <behaviour + exact facts: setting keys, defaults, limits, where it surfaces>
